context_excerpt.text: so the way student d may do it and student j is doing it may be differently but as long as they re shading in that fractional part that i asked there s more than one way to shade it in question i asked the other group the same thing and it came up yesterday can you just shade in 20 boxes anywhere on that rectangular area

context_excerpt.text: because then it wouldn t be four twelfths it would be one sixtieths if they were all over the place i m going to go to this group how are you guys doing over here i have a question since student d decided to do it this way part of his math he likes to play but he had to draw six twelfths what s one twelfth of this 5 by 12 rectangle what s the whole area the whole area is 60 so what s one twelfth of 60
